name: Memo Maze
tagline: Memorize the maze. Swipe the path. Don't lose your way.
description: A mobile memory puzzle. Study a tile maze, watch it vanish, then navigate from memory with swipe gestures. Chain moves into sequences for scoring multipliers, dodge traps and ice, and earn crystals across 30 hand-crafted levels in a dark dungeon of torchlight and scarabs.

features.title: Memorize-then-navigate
features.description: See the maze for a few seconds, then swipe through it blind. The whole game lives in this tight loop.

features.title: Move sequence queue
features.description: Chain swipes into sequences for 1.5x, 2x, and 3x scoring multipliers — plan ahead, commit fast.

features.title: Traps, ice & jumps
features.description: Push-back traps, slide-chain ice tiles, crumbling floors, and gap-jump mechanics raise the stakes.

features.title: Crystal economy & Glimpse
features.description: Earn crystals from stars, spend 50 for a 1.5s Glimpse that reveals the maze again when you're lost.

features.title: 30 hand-crafted levels
features.description: Five chapters with a clear difficulty curve — First Steps, Twists & Turns, Against the Clock, and more.

features.title: In-game level designer
features.description: Tap-to-cycle editor with BFS validation builds a My Levels chapter from your own mazes.
